evidence: frontend/src/App.tsx — route nested under ProtectedRoute with requiresAuth meta

frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — applies data-bubble-id bTHDa on shell root when pageBubbleId provided
frontend/src/lib/journal/routes.ts — exports ai_RNbBKLUl and ai_RNbBKLUm instance constants
frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx — passes headerBubbleId and sidebarBubbleId to DashboardLayout
frontend/src/components/DashboardLayout.tsx — forwards instance ids to Header and AppSidebar
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx — data-bubble-id={bubbleId} on Sidebar root with journal override
ir/inventory.json — ai_RNbBKLUl and ai_RNbBKLUm are CustomElement children of bTHDa per bTHDb____root.json
frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx — journal UI wrapped in div with data-bubble-id ai_RNbBHXid and data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL
frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx — editor Dialog and delete AlertDialog render outside ai_RNbBHXid boundary (page-level siblings inside DashboardLayout children)

functional_audit.check: /journal route registered and auth-guarded via ProtectedRoute parent
Journal page mounts AppShellLayout with page-level CustomElement instance overrides
Journal content renders inside ai_RNbBHXid boundary; page-level dialogs remain outside journal-main

ui_evidence.notes: Page root on DashboardLayout outer wrapper when Journal passes pageBubbleId
Journal-specific header CustomElement instance on Header via bubbleId override
Journal-specific sidebar CustomElement instance on AppSidebar via bubbleId override
journal-main content boundary wraps page children with data-module-owner MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL

gaps.finding: IR places ai_RNbBKLUl, ai_RNbBKLUm, and ai_RNbBHXid as bTHDa siblings; React shell still nests Header inside the main column to the right of the sidebar (inherited from SHELL-05). Page-instance markers are correct but full-width header sibling layout remains unresolved.

critiques.finding: SHELL-07 added correct page-instance bubble ids (ai_RNbBKLUl/ai_RNbBKLUm) but did not restructure DashboardLayout to match bTHDb sibling order (full-width header above sidebar+main row). Header remains nested in the right column per SHELL-05 shadcn SidebarProvider pattern.
critiques.alternative: Restructure DashboardLayout: offline banner → full-width Header (page instance) → flex row (sidebar instance | scrollable main containing only ai_RNbBHXid children), aligning DOM hierarchy with IR page-root siblings.

critiques.finding: Decompose scope says 'popups and journal widgets out of scope' and AC-3 defers page-level popups, but brownfield implementation retains full prototype journal CRUD UI and editor/delete dialogs. Ownership marker (data-module-owner) and journal-main boundary are present; popup/widget IR subtree alignment is correctly deferred to MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL.
critiques.alternative: If strict shell-only landing is required, replace prototype journal widgets with a minimal placeholder inside ai_RNbBHXid until JOURNAL-01+ lands; otherwise document brownfield retention as intentional in coverage preflight.

critiques.finding: frontend/src/lib/journal/routes.ts exports JOURNAL_ROUTE but authenticatedRoutes.tsx still hardcodes '/journal' string instead of importing the constant.
critiques.alternative: Import JOURNAL_ROUTE in authenticatedRoutes.tsx (and any navigate targets) for single source of truth.
